Metadata.homeDescription: Full-service machinery export from USA & Canada — pickup, dismantling, packing, documentation & ocean shipping. 1,000+ exports. Free quote in 24 hrs.
Metadata.aboutDescription: Meridian Freight — 1,000+ equipment exports since 2013. Iowa HQ with 6 partner warehouses across USA & Canada. Get a free quote today.
Metadata.contactTitle: Contact Us — Free Machinery Export Quote in 24 Hours
Metadata.contactDescription: Get a free machinery export quote — we respond within 24 hours. Reach us via WhatsApp, phone, or email. 1,000+ equipment exports from USA & Canada.
Metadata.faqTitle: FAQ — Machinery Export & Shipping Questions Answered
Metadata.faqDescription: Answers to common machinery export questions — shipping timelines, container sizes, pricing, customs documentation, insurance & payment options.
Metadata.servicesDescription: Machinery export services: professional dismantling, container packing, global shipping, documentation & warehousing. One company, door to port. Free quotes.
Metadata.projectsDescription: 1,000+ machinery exports completed. See our portfolio — John Deere combines, Case IH headers, CAT excavators shipped to Brazil, UAE, Turkey & beyond.
Metadata.pricingDescription: Transparent machinery export pricing — 60+ equipment types, 20+ shipping routes. Itemized quotes with no hidden fees. Try our instant freight calculator.
Metadata.calculatorDescription: Free freight calculator — instant estimate for machinery export. Select equipment, ZIP code & destination. Packing + shipping costs in 60 seconds.
Metadata.destinationsDescription: Heavy machinery shipping from the USA and Canada to 40+ countries — Latin America, Middle East, Africa, Eastern Europe, and Central Asia.
Metadata.blogTitle: Blog — Heavy Equipment Export Tips & Shipping Guides
Metadata.blogDescription: Expert guides, cost breakdowns, and destination insights for shipping heavy machinery and farm equipment from the USA. Published by the Meridian Freight team.
Metadata.privacyDescription: Privacy policy for Meridian Freight Inc. How we collect, use, and protect your data when you use our machinery export services.
Metadata.termsDescription: Terms of service for Meridian Freight Inc. Conditions governing machinery export, freight services, and use of our website.
Metadata.sharedShippingTitle: Shared Container Shipping — Book Space, Ship for Less
Metadata.sharedShippingDescription: Book available space in our outbound shipping containers. Ship your cargo without paying for a full container. View real-time availability and request space online.
Metadata.scheduleDescription: Live shipping schedule showing container departures, in-transit shipments, and arrivals from the USA to 27+ countries. Updated every 15 minutes.

Header.logoAlt: Meridian Freight Inc. — Go to homepage

Footer.companyDescription: One company for the entire export chain — equipment pickup, dismantling, packing, documentation, and worldwide shipping from the USA and Canada.
Footer.quoteDescription: Tell us what you need shipped — free quote within 24 hours.
Footer.trustSignals: Fully Insured · 1,000+ Exports Completed · Licensed Freight Forwarder
Footer.languagesSpoken: We speak English, Spanish, Russian & Arabic

Hero.body: Coordinating a trucker, a packer, a customs broker, and a freight line across borders is a full-time job. We replace all four — one team, one invoice, zero handoffs.
Hero.authority: Air & ocean freight via Maersk, Hapag-Lloyd & CMA CGM to Latin America, the Middle East, Africa, Eastern Europe & beyond
Hero.ctaPrimaryAriaLabel: Get a free quote on WhatsApp
Hero.heroImageAlt: John Deere S670 combine being secured on a Hapag-Lloyd flat rack by crew in hi-vis vests

ProcessSteps.heading: Four Steps. One Point of Contact.
ProcessSteps.description: Most exports involve a trucker, a dismantler, a packer, a broker, and a shipping line. With us, you talk to one person from start to finish.
ProcessSteps.step1Description: Send us the equipment details and destination. You get a detailed, itemized quote within 24 hours.
ProcessSteps.step2Description: Our team collects the equipment from anywhere in the USA or Canada and brings it to our facility.
ProcessSteps.step3Description: We take it apart, tag every component, pack it into the container, and prepare all export paperwork.
ProcessSteps.step4Description: We book your container on the next available vessel — you get real-time tracking, customs docs, and arrival confirmation.

ServicesGrid.heading: Everything Between Seller and Port
ServicesGrid.description: Each service below is something you'd otherwise coordinate separately. We bundle them into one project with one invoice.

ProjectGrid.heading: Equipment We've Shipped
ProjectGrid.description: Every project below went from seller's lot to ocean vessel. Destination, container type, weight, and transit time included.

VideoSection.heading: From Dismantle to Container — In Under 3 Minutes
VideoSection.description: Watch our team dismantle, pack, and load heavy equipment into shipping containers at our Iowa facility.
VideoSection.thumbnailAlt: Video thumbnail — Meridian Freight machinery loading operations

HomePage.readyToShip: Ready to Ship? Get Your Quote in 24 Hours
HomePage.calcHeading: Calculate Your Export Cost in 60 Seconds
HomePage.calcDescription: Pick your equipment type and destination. Our calculator breaks down every line item — inland freight, packing, ocean shipping — in 60 seconds.
HomePage.contactHeading: Get Your Detailed Quote — No Hidden Fees
HomePage.contactDescription: Equipment type, location, and destination — that's all we need to send you an itemized, line-by-line quote within 24 hours.

AboutPage.heading: About {company}
AboutPage.intro1: Since {year}, we've shipped {count}+ pieces of heavy equipment from the USA and Canada to ports in Latin America, Africa, the Middle East, and Central Asia. We handle the entire chain — pickup, dismantling, packing, documentation, and ocean freight — so international buyers don't have to coordinate multiple vendors.
AboutPage.intro2: Our technicians know the disassembly specs for John Deere, Case IH, CAT, Kinze, and dozens of other brands. Every component gets tagged, photographed, and packed so it reassembles correctly on the other end.
AboutPage.diff1Description: Most exporters hand you off between trucker, packer, and freight forwarder. We own the entire chain — pickup to port — so nothing falls through the cracks.
AboutPage.diff2Description: We work with Maersk, Hapag-Lloyd, and CMA CGM on established routes to Latin America, Africa, the Middle East, and Central Asia. If it has a port, we can get there.
AboutPage.diff3Description: {years}+ years dismantling combines, headers, sprayers, and excavators. We know which bolts to pull, how to tag components, and how to pack it so it reassembles right.
AboutPage.operateDescription: Our main packing facility is in Iowa — central enough to keep inland freight costs low. Six partner warehouses across the US and Canada give us coverage wherever your equipment is.
AboutPage.ctaDescription: Equipment type, pickup location, and destination — that's all we need for a detailed, itemized quote. No obligation.

ContactPage.heading: Get Your Quote in 24 Hours
ContactPage.description: Tell us the equipment, where it is, and where it's going. We send back every line item — inland freight, packing, ocean shipping — so you know exactly what you're paying for.

FaqPage.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
FaqPage.description: Everything you need to know about exporting machinery from the USA and Canada — timelines, pricing, documentation, and more.
FaqPage.stillHaveQuestionsDescription: Send us your equipment details and destination — we'll answer everything and send a quote within 24 hours.

DestinationsPage.heroHeading: We Ship to Any Port Worldwide
DestinationsPage.heroDescription: {company} exports machinery from the USA and Canada to 40+ countries across six continents. If it has a seaport, we can get your equipment there.
DestinationsPage.moreCountriesDescription: The routes above have dedicated guides, but we regularly ship to every country listed below — and anywhere else with a seaport.
DestinationsPage.dontSeeCountry: Don't see your country? We still ship there.
DestinationsPage.tellUsDestination: Tell us where your equipment needs to go
DestinationsPage.ctaDescription: Tell us the equipment type, location, and destination. You get a detailed, itemized quote within 24 hours — any country, any port.

PricingPage.heading: Transparent Pricing — Every Line Item Visible
PricingPage.description: We believe you should see exactly where every dollar goes before you commit. Reference rates for 60+ equipment types and 20+ shipping routes — every quote is itemized, with no hidden fees.
PricingPage.ratesUpdated: Rates updated quarterly. Last reviewed: Q1 2026. Request your custom quote for exact pricing.
PricingPage.calcDescription: Use our freight calculator to get an estimated cost for your equipment and destination.
PricingPage.ctaDescription: These are reference rates. Your actual quote depends on equipment condition, pickup distance, and destination. Send us the details — we quote within 24 hours, no obligation, no pressure.
PricingPage.chatOnWhatsAppAriaLabel: Chat on WhatsApp for a pricing quote

ServicesPage.heading: Machinery Export Services — USA & Canada
ServicesPage.description: One company for the entire chain — pickup, dismantling, packing, documentation, and air or ocean shipping from any location in the USA or Canada.
ServicesPage.ctaHeading: Have Equipment That Needs to Move?
ServicesPage.ctaDescription: Send us the make, model, and destination. You get a line-by-line quote within 24 hours — no obligation.

ProjectsPage.heading: Completed Export Projects
ProjectsPage.description: Real shipments, real equipment, real destinations. Browse our portfolio of machinery exports across six continents.

PrivacyPage.heading: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.infoWeCollectDescription: When you use our website or contact forms, we may collect the following information:
PrivacyPage.infoItem1: Name, email address, phone number, and company name (when you submit a form)
PrivacyPage.infoItem2: Equipment and shipping details you provide in quote requests
PrivacyPage.infoItem3: Usage data collected through Google Analytics 4 and Vercel Analytics
PrivacyPage.infoItem4: Cookies for analytics purposes (with your consent)
PrivacyPage.useItem1: To respond to your inquiries and provide quotes
PrivacyPage.useItem2: To send you relevant communications about your inquiry
PrivacyPage.useItem3: To improve our website and services through analytics
PrivacyPage.useItem4: To run targeted advertising campaigns (with consent)
PrivacyPage.thirdPartyDescription: We use the following third-party services:
PrivacyPage.dataRetentionDescription: We retain your contact information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected, typically up to 3 years after your last interaction.
PrivacyPage.yourRightsDescription: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at

TermsPage.heading: Terms of Service
TermsPage.section1Description: {company} provides machinery dismantling, container packing, storage, export documentation, and shipping coordination services. All services are subject to individual project agreements and quotes.
TermsPage.section2Description: All quotes are estimates and may be subject to change based on actual equipment condition, accessibility, and market conditions. Final pricing is confirmed in writing before work begins. Prices displayed on the website are for reference and may not reflect current rates.
TermsPage.section3Description: Payment terms are established in individual project agreements. Standard terms require a deposit before work begins with the balance due upon completion.
TermsPage.section4Description: While we take every precaution to protect your equipment, our liability is limited to the coverage provided by our insurance policies. We carry comprehensive coverage for equipment in our care, custody, and control.
TermsPage.section5Description: Projects may be cancelled with written notice. Cancellation fees may apply if work has already commenced. Deposits for completed work are non-refundable.
TermsPage.section6Description: The freight calculator and pricing information on this website are provided for estimation purposes only and do not constitute a binding offer. Actual costs may vary.
